targets.query:
SELECT LAST("level") AS "level", LAST("status") AS "status"
FROM "bulkTankStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "btNo" = '$tankNo'
AND $timeFilter

SELECT MEAN("level") AS "level"
FROM "bulkTankStatusMain"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
AND "btNo" = '$tankNo'
AND $timeFilter
GROUP BY time(30m) fill(null)
-- fill null was previous before. test and change accordingly

list.definition:
SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "bulkTankStatusMain"
WITH KEY = "btNo"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
list.label: Tank
list.name: tankNo

query.query:
SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "bulkTankStatusMain"
WITH KEY = "btNo"
WHERE "plantNo" = '$plantNo'
